headline: Keysight and WIN Semiconductors Collaborate to Cut Design Risk for High Frequency RF Components
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., June 30, 2026--New GaN MMIC design workflow reduces fabrication risk for 5G, satellite and defense applications.
